title: Naruto
synopsis: A young outcast ninja chases recognition from his village while carrying a dangerous power sealed inside him.

title: Attack on Titan
synopsis: Humanity hides behind massive walls to survive man-eating giants, until one boy vows to wipe them out.

title: Death Note
synopsis: A genius student gains a notebook that kills anyone whose name is written in it, and begins reshaping the world.

title: Demon Slayer
synopsis: After his family is slaughtered, a boy trains as a demon slayer to save his only surviving sister.

title: One Piece
synopsis: A rubber-bodied pirate sails the seas in search of the legendary treasure that will make him king.

title: My Hero Academia
synopsis: In a world where almost everyone has superpowers, a powerless boy fights to become the greatest hero anyway.

title: Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood
synopsis: Two brothers use alchemy in a doomed attempt to bring their mother back, paying a steep price for it.

title: Jujutsu Kaisen
synopsis: A boy swallows a cursed talisman to save his friends and becomes host to a powerful curse himself.
